chapter_title.ar: باب السَّلَمِ فِي الرَّقِيقِ وَ غَيْرِهِ مِنَ الْحَيَوَانِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 98 – The submission of advance payment regarding the slave and others from the animals

text: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ جَمِيلِ بْنِ دَرَّاجٍ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِالسَّلَمِ فِي الْحَيَوَانِ إِذَا وُصِفَتْ أَسْنَانُهَا .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel Bin Darraj, from Zurara,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There is no problem with the submission of the advance payment regarding the animals, when its age has been described’.
